topWPAPlays.description: Carson Kelly hits a grand slam (4) to left center field. Seiya Suzuki scores. Ian Happ scores. Matt Shaw scores.
Seiya Suzuki doubles (10) on a fly ball to right fielder Jesús Sánchez. Pete Crow-Armstrong scores. Alex Bregman scores.
Nico Hoerner strikes out swinging.
Matt Shaw walks. Seiya Suzuki to 3rd. Ian Happ to 2nd.
Pete Crow-Armstrong walks.
Kerry Carpenter doubles (4) on a fly ball to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Dillon Dingler scores. Riley Greene scores.
Edgar Quero grounds into a double play, second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to shortstop Zach McKinstry to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Colson Montgomery out at 2nd. Edgar Quero out at 1st.
Matt Vierling homers (5) on a line drive to center field. Dillon Dingler scores.
Junior Perez homers (1) on a line drive to left center field.
Luisangel Acuña singles on a line drive to left fielder Riley Greene. Sam Antonacci to 3rd.
Ben Rice homers (21) on a fly ball to center field. Spencer Jones scores. Anthony Volpe scores.
Jazz Chisholm Jr. homers (11) on a fly ball to right field.
JJ Bleday strikes out on a foul tip and Blake Dunn caught stealing 2nd, catcher J.C. Escarra to shortstop Anthony Volpe to catcher J.C. Escarra.

Anthony Volpe walks. Spencer Jones to 2nd.

Luis García Jr. homers (10) on a fly ball to left field.
Jacob Young reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Jonathan Aranda, assist to third baseman Junior Caminero. Jorbit Vivas to 2nd.

Taylor Walls singles on a line drive to center fielder Jacob Young. Richie Palacios scores.
Liam Hicks singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Esteury Ruiz scores. Javier Sanoja to 3rd. Liam Hicks to 2nd.
Rafael Devers homers (11) on a fly ball to right center field.

Javier Sanoja singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Sam Hentges. Esteury Ruiz to 2nd.
Owen Caissie homers (8) on a fly ball to center field.
Mauricio Dubón singles on a line drive to left fielder Jackson Chourio. Jorge Mateo scores. Ozzie Albies scores. Matt Olson to 2nd.

Brewers challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Brewers challenged (home-plate collision), call on the field was upheld: Brice Turang singles on a line drive to left fielder Eli White. Christian Yelich scores. Jackson Chourio out at home on the throw, left fielder Eli White to catcher Drake Baldwin.
Jackson Chourio doubles (12) on a line drive to left fielder Eli White. Christian Yelich to 3rd.
Sal Frelick grounds out, pitcher Robert Suarez to first baseman Matt Olson.
Dominic Smith strikes out on a foul tip.
Ty France hits a grand slam (7) to right field. Samad Taylor scores. Gavin Sheets scores. Xander Bogaerts scores.
Alejandro Osuna doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Samad Taylor. Josh Jung scores. Brandon Nimmo scores. Ezequiel Duran to 3rd.

Jose Altuve homers (8) on a fly ball to left field. Yordan Alvarez scores. Isaac Paredes scores.

Brayan Rocchio doubles (11) on a line drive to right fielder Cam Smith. Travis Bazzana scores.
Isaac Paredes singles on a ground ball to right fielder Kahlil Watson. Christian Walker scores. Isaac Paredes to 2nd. Throwing error by right fielder Kahlil Watson.
Umpire reviewed (home run), call on the field was upheld: Jeremy Peña homers (5) on a line drive to left field.
Isaac Collins doubles (10) on a line drive to left fielder Lars Nootbaar. Michael Massey scores. John Rave scores.

Michael Massey singles on a ground ball to center fielder Nathan Church. Jac Caglianone scores. Michael Massey to 2nd. Michael Massey advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by center fielder Nathan Church.
Jac Caglianone singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Nathan Church. Lane Thomas scores.
Alec Burleson doubles (19) on a sharp line drive to right fielder John Rave. Iván Herrera to 3rd.
Iván Herrera singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder John Rave. Nathan Church scores.
Braxton Fulford doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jake Mangum. Tyler Freeman scores. Cole Carrigg scores.

Tristan Gray called out on strikes and Kyler Fedko caught stealing 2nd, catcher Gabriel Moreno to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to catcher Gabriel Moreno.
